input.background: Here is more practice in classifying variables as quantitative, ordinal, or categorical.
input.question: Movie review rating: 1 star, 1 1/2 stars, 2 stars, 2 1/2 stars, 3 stars, 3 1/2 stars, 4 stars

movie_review_rating.description: The rating of a movie review, represented as an ordinal variable with increasing levels of stars.
